description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the gradle:4.5.1-jdk9 Docker image. Define two stages, build and test, and set the variable GRADLE_OPTS to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. In the build stage add a build job that runs a before_script exporting GRADLE_USER_HOME to the repository .gradle folder, then executes gradle assemble, caches the .gradle/caches directory, and publishes '**/build/classes' and '**/build/libs/*.jar' as artifacts. In the test stage add a test job that runs gradle check. Both jobs run on any branch with no additional rules.
